# textfield.gadget

AmiChatGPT bundles `textfield.gadget` 3.1 for multiline prompt editing on AmigaOS.

- Original package: `dev/gui/textfield.lha` from Aminet
- Author: Mark Thomas
- Copyright: Copyright (C) 1995 Mark Thomas
- Runtime file shipped in AmiChatGPT packages: `Gadgets/textfield.gadget`

The original license is stored in `LICENSE.txt`. The original programmer
documentation is stored in `textfield_gc.doc`.
